title: Cache Geometry Under Obfuscation
subtitle: KV-Cloak as defense against adversarial KV-cache steering
abstract: KV-Cloak, a reversible matrix-based cache obfuscation scheme, completely transforms the external feature space — a detector calibrated on uncloaked caches cannot operate on cloaked caches. Models are robust to random perturbation at steering-vector magnitudes. A defensive Oracle Loop operating inside a trusted execution environment retains full detection capability on the unobfuscated internal cache, establishing an asymmetry favoring defense.
